name: Blue Bottle Coffee
description: Industrial-chic cafe known for its signature single-origin drip coffees, espresso, and fresh pastries.

name: Sightglass Coffee
description: Spacious, multi-level roastery and bar featuring handcrafted espresso drinks, pour-overs, and an open layout.

name: Four Barrel Coffee
description: Hip, high-ceilinged cafe offering house-roasted beans, art on the walls, and a zero-wifi, social-focused environment.

name: Ritual Coffee Roasters
description: Pioneering specialty coffee bar with a bright red theme, serving expertly sourced and roasted seasonal coffees.

name: The Mill
description: A collaborative space by Four Barrel Coffee and Josey Baker Bread, famous for its premium artisanal toast and rustic vibes.

name: Jane on Fillmore
description: Charming neighborhood bakery and cafe serving delicious healthy breakfast options, specialty coffees, and fresh-baked goods.

name: Sextant Coffee Roasters
description: Specializing in Ethiopian single-origin coffees, this rustic-industrial roastery features an outdoor patio and rich, flavorful brews.

name: Saint Frank Coffee
description: Minimalist, light-filled coffee bar offering artisan beans, custom espresso machines, and a focus on transparency and relationships.
